LanguageData.VQE_FarmingDrone.label: farming drone
LanguageData.VQE_FarmingDrone.description: An automated utility drone designed for agriculture. It patrols growing zones, capable of both harvesting mature crops and sowing new ones, provided the plants do not require a specific growing skill to plant.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_FarmingDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
